stories.title: World Cup live: Morocco reach quarterfinals after ...
Ounahi brace for Morocco eliminates Canada
stories.summary: A second-half brace from Azzedine Ounahi and a third from Soufiane Rahimi saw Morocco become the first nation to make the quarterfinals of the World Cup with a 3-0 win over co-hosts Canada.

stories.title: Serena (knee) pulls out of Wimbledon doubles
stories.summary: Serena Williams, the 23-time Grand Slam singles champion, has withdrawn from doubles competition at Wimbledon with a right knee injury, she announced Saturday.

stories.title: Chestnut woofs 66 hot dogs as he, Sudo defend
stories.summary: Record holder Joey Chestnut took down 66 hot dogs to claim the Mustard Belt for the 18th time, while Miki Sudo downed 38.75 hot dogs for her record 12th victory.

stories.title: Holloway predicts win vs. McGregor, then trilogy
stories.summary: UFC star Max Holloway said he believes he will defeat Conor McGregor on July 11 at UFC 329, setting up a possible trilogy bout between the pair later this year at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas.
